title: ferulago angulata
intro: Ferulago angulata, also known as Angled Fennel or Ferulago, is a perennial plant species belonging to the parsley family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ferulago angulata include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Ferulago angulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
